title: bomarea oculata
intro: Bomarea oculata, also known as the eye-bomb, is a species of flowering plant in the family Alstroemeriaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of eye and skin disorders. The health benefits of Bomarea oculata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe and protect the eyes and skin. Bomarea oculata is typically prepared as a decoction or tincture and is used to treat conditions such as conjunctivitis and eczema.
